## Checklist
- [ ] I have run `scripts/lint-consistency.py` locally to ensure no data mismatches.
- [ ] I have not accidentally committed binaries (e.g. `gh`), `.env` files, or generated diffs.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, website, etc.) if applicable.
- [ ] **Tests**: I have added and successfully executed unit and integration tests. Existing things work fine.
- [ ] **Tool-level changes**: I have personally used the changes and verified the user experience is smooth and without hiccups.
- [ ] **Scale Testing**: I have cloned a large repository and run the MCP server against it to ensure it does not break at scale.
- [ ] **Customer Focus**: I have thought through all end-customer angles and addressed them in this implementation.
